quarterly_tracker.name: Centene Corporation
quarterly_tracker.notes: Largest Medicaid MCO. Medicaid members down 23.3% from pre-unwinding. 2026 guide: adj EPS >$3.00, prem/service rev $170-174B.

quarterly_tracker.name: Molina Healthcare
quarterly_tracker.notes: Medicaid-focused MCO. 90%+ members are Medicaid. CEO: market underfunded by 300-400bp. Every 100bp MCR = ~$5/share. Membership down only 5.5% from pre-unwinding (best of Big Five).

quarterly_tracker.name: Elevance Health (Anthem/BCBS)
quarterly_tracker.notes: Operates Medicaid as Anthem/BCBS plans + Amerigroup. Medicaid enrollment down 28.5% from pre-unwinding (worst of Big Five). Exited many CA counties in 2024. First reported Medicaid rev separately in Q3 2025.

quarterly_tracker.name: UnitedHealth Group
quarterly_tracker.notes: UnitedHealthcare Community & State division. Medicaid rev grew 26.8% despite 11.9% enrollment decline. Optum integration deep. Acquired Amedisys 2024.

quarterly_tracker.name: CVS Health (Aetna)
quarterly_tracker.notes: Aetna Better Health Medicaid plans. Enrollment down 16.8% from pre-unwinding. CVS reported 17.3% increase in medical expenses PMPM in 2024.
